fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code to identify the price group.

fields.name: Price Includes VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the prices given for this price group will include VAT.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the ordinary invoice discount calculation will apply to customers in this price group.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Gr. (Price)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT business posting group that determines the default VAT percentage to add to sales prices for customers in this group.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the customer price group.

fields.name: Coupled to Dataverse
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the customer price group is coupled to a price list in Dynamics 365 Sales.

fields.name: Price Calculation Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price calculation method that will override the method set in the sales setup for customers in this group.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a line discount will be calculated when the sales price is offered.
